title: QA: Verify I6 delegation non-escalation enforcement and v0.2 extensibility
intent: Verify that I6 property tests are meaningful, the enforcement logic is correct for all edge cases, and the implementation does not preclude per-agent capability scoping.
acceptance_criteria: Property tests cover: empty delegated_capabilities, single valid type, single invalid type, mixed valid/invalid
Property tests cover: AgentSpawn and AgentDelegationGrant both trigger I6 check
No regression in existing kernel tests
authority.ts v0.2 design notes are clear and actionable for per-agent C_eff implementation
checkDelegationNonEscalation accepts an enabledCapSet parameter (not hardcoded to snapshot global) — extensible for per-agent sets
